findings.detail: Clean horizontal LR pipeline with 6 nodes on a single straight path: User Question -> Knowledge Source -> Retrieved Passages -> Enriched Prompt -> AI Model -> Grounded Answer. No branches, no overlaps possible at nodeSpacing:55/rankSpacing:70 with short 2-word labels. 1400px width is ample for 6 nodes with 2-word bold labels + 12px subtitles. Linear left-to-right pipeline layout matches the three-step sequential RAG intent exactly.

All 6 node labels map 1:1 to the corpus Core Concepts: 'User Question' (query), 'Knowledge Source' (Step 1 retrieve entity), 'Retrieved Passages' (Step 1 output), 'Enriched Prompt' (Step 2 augment output), 'AI Model' (Step 3 generator), 'Grounded Answer' (Step 3 output). No embeddings, vector DB, similarity search, or chunking nodes present (Week 14 deferred concepts correctly excluded). All labels <= 4 words. No bare unexplained acronyms as node labels. Title 'RAG - Retrieve, Augment, Generate' in config title: field, not a ghost node.

Entry (User Question) uses start/act blue (#a5d8ff), pipeline steps (Retrieved Passages, Enriched Prompt, AI Model) use auto purple (#d0bfff), terminal (Grounded Answer) uses done green (#b2f2bb). Knowledge Source uses act blue to visually distinguish it as the external entity. No color tier violations.

stats.png_dims: 1400x~220 (estimated — render with: mmdc -i diagram.mmd -o diagram.png -w 1400 -b transparent)

preflight.mermaid_parse: pass (source-level syntax valid; config block uses correct nested config: themeVariables: flowchart: structure)
preflight.label_discipline: pass (all bold labels <= 4 words: 'User Question', 'Knowledge Source', 'Retrieved Passages', 'Enriched Prompt', 'AI Model', 'Grounded Answer')
preflight.concept_fidelity: pass (all labels trace to corpus Step 1/2/3 language; no Week-14 deferred concepts included)
preflight.jargon_label: pass (no bare unexplained acronyms; 'AI Model' is corpus-defined)
preflight.title_discipline: pass (governing concept 'RAG - Retrieve, Augment, Generate' in title: config field)

stats.render_note: PNG requires mmdc on PATH. Run: mmdc -i <mmd_path> -o <png_path> -w 1400 -b transparent
